_description: Curated video suggestions the Coach can recommend to men refining their SMART goals. Each entry uses a YouTube SEARCH URL rather than a specific video URL so that link-rot doesn't produce dead links. Edit freely to reflect the videos you want the brotherhood watching. The Coach picks 0-2 per response based on which best fit the goal being discussed.

videos.title: SMART goals framework — the basics
videos.why: Best starter clip for a man who has never framed a goal SMART before. Covers what each letter means with concrete examples.

videos.title: Michael Hyatt — Best Year Ever / SMARTER goals
videos.why: Extends SMART to SMARTER (Exciting, Risky) — great for men whose goals feel safe or uninspiring.

videos.title: James Clear — Atomic Habits and goal-vs-system thinking
videos.why: For men whose goals lack a repeatable daily rhythm — reframes goals into habits.

videos.title: Craig Groeschel Leadership Podcast — goal setting
videos.why: Christian leadership frame on setting goals that matter — good for the Faith F.

videos.title: Dave Ramsey — setting financial goals
videos.why: Concrete, biblically-anchored money goals — for the Finances F when a man writes something vague like 'save more'.

videos.title: Simon Sinek — Start With Why
videos.why: For a goal that feels flat — helps a man articulate WHY he's chasing it, which strengthens the Relevant leg of SMART.

videos.title: John Maxwell — goals vs growth
videos.why: For a man setting arrival goals (e.g. 'lose 20 lbs') instead of growth goals — helpful reframe.

videos.title: Man in the Mirror — biblical goal setting for men
videos.why: Christian men's ministry frame — directly speaks to the 5F rhythm we use.
